posts.headline: Ravens prez blames 'slow news cycle' for Crosby nixed trade fallout
posts.body: Ravens team president Sashi Brown said Monday that the rescinding of the Maxx Crosby trade won't negatively affect the team's reputation, chalking up the criticism to "a slow news cycle."

posts.headline: 49ers coach, owner deliver mixed messages on Aiyuk's future
posts.body: 49ers coach Kyle Shanahan and owner Jed York delivered differing messages on Brandon Aiyuk's future Monday.

posts.headline: Sources: Browns pull proposal to allow pick trades five years out
posts.body: The Browns have withdrawn their rule proposal to allow NFL teams to trade draft picks five years into the future instead of three, according to NFL Network.

posts.headline: 2026 NFL draft rankings: Scouts Inc.'s full board, grades
posts.body: Here are Scouts Inc.'s 2026 NFL draft rankings, with evaluation grades for the top prospects.

posts.headline: Fernando Mendoza: 2026 NFL draft scouting report, QB ranking
posts.body: Mendoza is the top quarterback in the 2026 draft class. What are his strengths and weaknesses, and will he go No. 1?

posts.headline: Schrager talks with McAfee about Rams' trade discussions on Davante Adams
posts.body: Peter Schrager joins "The Pat McAfee Show" to talk about Sean McVay acknowledging the Rams had trade discussions surrounding Davante Adams.

posts.headline: 2026 NFL draft Big Board rankings: Mel Kiper's top prospects
posts.body: Mel Kiper Jr. is stacking the best players in the NFL draft class, starting with Fernando Mendoza. Who makes the top 25?

posts.headline: Why Colts co-owner/CEO would like even number of regular season games
posts.body: Colts co-owner/CEO Carlie Irsay-Gordon joins Pat McAfee to discuss changing the amount of NFL regular season games.

posts.headline: The Super Bowl is returning to Las Vegas in 2029, per sources. It now has been officially approved.
posts.body: The Super Bowl is returning to Las Vegas in 2029, per sources. It now has been officially approved.

posts.headline: Tiger Woods was arrested and charged with DUI, property damage and refusal to submit, per the Martin County Sheriff in Florida.

posts.headline: Bills re-signed S Damar Hamlin to a one-year deal.

posts.headline:
The 2026 NFL regular season will kick off Wednesday Sept. 9 at 8:20 p.m. ET in Seattle with the Super Bowl LX champion Seahawks.

The San Francisco 49ers will face the Los Angeles Rams in the first-ever NFL regular season game in Melbourne, Australia on Thursday, Sept. 10 at approximately 8:35 p.m. ET at the iconic Melbourne Cricket Ground.
posts.body:
The 2026 NFL regular season will kick off Wednesday Sept. 9 at 8:20 p.m. ET in Seattle with the Super Bowl LX champion Seahawks.

The San Francisco 49ers will face the Los Angeles Rams in the...

posts.headline: The 49ers and Rams will play Thursday, Sept. 10 at 5:35 p.m. PT at the Melbourne Cricket Ground in Australia. Due to the 17-hour time difference, the 49ers and Rams will take the field Friday at 10:35 a.m. (AEST) in Melbourne, with the game airing Thursday evening in the United States.
posts.body: The 49ers and Rams will play Thursday, Sept. 10 at 5:35 p.m. PT at the Melbourne Cricket Ground in Australia.

posts.headline: There will be no discussion about the Tush Push at next week’s NFL owners’ meetings; the play will be back in 2026.
posts.body: There will be no discussion about the Tush Push at next week’s NFL owners’ meetings; the play will be back in 2026.

posts.headline: The site for Super Bowl LXIII is now set to be voted on at next week’s NFL owners meetings, and it is now expected to return to Las Vegas. It’s a “matter of formality,” one source said.
posts.body: The site for Super Bowl LXIII is now set to be voted on at next week’s NFL owners meetings, and it is now expected to return to Las Vegas. It’s a “matter of formality,” one source said.

posts.headline: Free-agent QB Joe Flacco has agreed to a 1-year deal with the Bengals.
posts.body: Free-agent QB Joe Flacco has agreed to a 1-year deal with the Bengals.

posts.headline: After 14 NFL seasons, Buccaneers LB Lavonte David announced his retirement.
posts.body: After 14 NFL seasons, Buccaneers LB Lavonte David announced his retirement.

posts.headline:
ESPN Sources: Offensive Player of the Year and Super-Bowl champion Jaxon Smith-Njigba reached agreement with the Seahawks on a four-year, $168.6 million contract extension that now makes him the highest-paid WR in NFL history. 

The deal averages $42.15 million per year, and includes over $120 million guaranteed, both setting records for any wide receiver.
posts.body: ESPN Sources: Offensive Player of the Year and Super-Bowl champion Jaxon Smith-Njigba reached agreement with the Seahawks on a four-year, $168.6 million contract extension that now makes him the...

posts.headline: A precursor to bigger deals: the Seahawks exercised the fifth-year contract options for WR Jaxon Smith-Njigba and CB Devon Witherspoon.
posts.body: A precursor to bigger deals: the Seahawks exercised the fifth-year contract options for WR Jaxon Smith-Njigba and CB Devon Witherspoon.

posts.headline:
A Falcons-Eagles trade, per ESPN sources:

Falcons and Eagles swapped fourth- and sixth-round picks, with Atlanta also acquiring S Sydney Brown.

Picks No. 114 and 197 to the Eagles in exchange for picks No. 122, 215 and Sydney Brown.
